title: Section 14
content: 1* * * * * 2*** Subject to such rules as may be made by the Central Government in this behalf, the Commission Commission may appoint such other officers and servants as it considers necessary for the efficient performance of its functions: 2* * * * *
footnote: 1. Sub-section (1), omitted by Act 12 of 1987, s. 8 (w.e.f. 24-7-1987). 2. The proviso and brackets and figure "(2)" omitted by s. 8, ibid. (w.e.f. 24-7-1987).
